# IssueAgent Memory

Project-centric state for requirement analysis and conflict resolution. Load at start, update at end.

## Product Direction

- `<high-level product goals, priorities>`

## Accepted Directions

- `<decisions that were explicitly confirmed and should be reused>`

## Rejected Directions

- `<decisions that were explicitly rejected and should not be revisited without new context>`

## Cross-Issue Requirement History

- `<requirements that span multiple issues, dependencies, ordering constraints>`

## Prior Conflict Resolutions

- `<how past conflicts (e.g., overlapping modules, ambiguous requirements) were resolved>`

## Last Updated

- `<issue number, date, or brief note>`
